---
title: "Emergent Intelligence"
subtitle: "Digital Lab Notebook & Research Matrix"
listing:
  id: project-listing
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  contents:
    - path: projects/cellular_automata/index.qmd
      title: "Cellular Automata"
      description: "Exploring Conway's Game of Life, elementary rulesets, and localized emergent structures."
    
    - path: projects/ants/index.qmd
      title: "Ant Colony Optimization"
      description: "Simulating swarm intelligence, complex pheromone mapping, and emergent collective behaviors."
    
    - path: projects/immune_system/index.qmd
      title: "Immune System Simulations"
      description: "Modeling artificial immune responses, pathogen defenses, and agent-based biological systems."
    
    - path: projects/spiking_neural_networks/index.qmd
      title: "Spiking Neural Networks"
      description: "Investigating time-dependent neural dynamics, STDP learning rules, and neuromorphic frameworks."
---

Welcome to my central research hub. Select a domain matrix below to explore my chronological project logs, active simulations, and codebases.

::: {#project-listing}
:::
